name: Tandem
description: Tandem turns ad-hoc AI planning into a governed, repo-native delivery lifecycle for Claude Code. Drive work from North Star → OKRs → PRD → Epic → Feature → Story → Testplan → ship, with a closed-set status enum, mandatory Story↔Testplan pairing, Definition-of-Ready/Done gates, automatic ADRs on every decision, auto-filed bugs on test failure, and a self-generating interactive Command Center. Stack-agnostic across web, mobile, CLI, library, backend, data-pipeline, Power Platform, and automation projects.
